nodes.name: org-structure.md
nodes.summary: Guide covering how Paperclip models organizational hierarchy with a chain-of-command structure, explaining how agents inherit authority rules from their parent in the org chart.

nodes.name: execution-policy.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive reference covering execution policy review and approval workflows, detailing the data model (executionPolicy, executionState, issue_execution_decisions), workflow variants, access control, API usage, and UI design principles.

nodes.name: openclaw-docker-setup.md
nodes.summary: Step-by-step setup guide for running the OpenClaw gateway adapter in Docker for local development, covering sandbox mode, Docker Compose fallback, known issues, and configuration reference.

nodes.name: 2026-03-13-issue-documents-plan.md
nodes.summary: Detailed implementation plan for attaching structured documents to issues, covering data model (documents, document_revisions, issue_documents tables), API contract, UI design, agent protocol, and a 5-phase rollout from schema to legacy migration.

nodes.name: agent-config-ui.md
nodes.summary: UI specification for the agent configuration and activity surfaces, detailing the agent creation dialog fields, agent detail page tabs (Overview, Configuration, Runs, Issues, Costs), component inventory, API surface, and implementation order.

nodes.name: cliphub-plan.md
nodes.summary: Product and technical specification for ClipHub, a marketplace for Paperclip team configurations, covering taxonomy (blueprints, skills, governance templates), data schemas, pages/routes, user flows, UI design, installation mechanics, revenue model, and MVP phases.

nodes.name: architecture.md
nodes.summary: High-level architecture overview describing Paperclip's monorepo structure, technology stack (Express/Hono, React/Vite, DrizzleORM, PostgreSQL), request flow, adapter model, and key design decisions.

nodes.name: core-concepts.md
nodes.summary: Glossary-style reference explaining the fundamental Paperclip concepts: Company, Agents, Issues (tasks with status lifecycle), Delegation, Heartbeats, and Governance.

nodes.name: quickstart.md
nodes.summary: Getting-started guide with recommended Docker-based quick-start and local development setup instructions, pointing readers to next steps like core concepts and architecture.

nodes.name: what-is-paperclip.md
nodes.summary: Introductory overview explaining Paperclip's two-layer design (Control Plane + Execution Adapters), the problem it solves, and its core orchestration principle.

nodes.name: promptfooconfig.yaml
nodes.summary: Promptfoo evaluation harness configuration wiring together model providers, prompt templates, default test variables, and test suite file references for evaluating heartbeat and governance LLM prompts.

nodes.name: heartbeat-system.txt
nodes.summary: System prompt template used for LLM evaluation of heartbeat behavior, defining the agent's identity and expected response format for the promptfoo eval harness.

nodes.name: core.yaml
nodes.summary: Core LLM evaluation test cases for Paperclip agent prompts, containing six scenario-based assertions that validate expected heartbeat and task-handling behaviors.

nodes.name: governance.yaml
nodes.summary: Governance-focused LLM evaluation test cases asserting correct agent behavior around approval workflows and policy enforcement.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Quick-start guide for the Paperclip promptfoo evaluation suite, covering prerequisites, how to run evals, what scenarios are tested, how to add new cases, and future evaluation phases.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root monorepo package.json using pnpm workspaces, defining project-wide scripts (build, test, lint, type-check, dev) and shared dev dependencies for the entire Paperclip repository.
nodes.languageNotes: Private pnpm workspace root; packageManager field pins the exact pnpm version for reproducibility.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Automated changelog for the @paperclipai/adapter-utils package tracking patch and minor releases from v0.2.1 through v0.3.1 with changeset-generated entries.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @paperclipai/adapter-utils defining ESM/CJS dual exports, published files, and build/test scripts for the shared adapter helper library.
nodes.languageNotes: Dual CJS/ESM export map pattern with publishConfig for npm registry scope.

nodes.name: billing.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the inferOpenAiCompatibleBiller function, verifying correct biller inference from environment variables across different provider URL configurations.

nodes.name: billing.ts
nodes.summary: Provides utility functions to infer the appropriate billing provider (OpenAI, OpenRouter, or custom) from adapter environment variables for OpenAI-compatible API integrations.

nodes.name: inferOpenAiCompatibleBiller
nodes.summary: Inspects adapter environment variables to determine which billing provider (openai, openrouter, or a custom URL-based biller) should be attributed for token usage.

nodes.name: command-managed-runtime.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test suite for the command-managed runtime client and preparation logic, covering file read/write, directory listing, install detection, and process execution scenarios.

nodes.name: command-managed-runtime.ts
nodes.summary: Implements command-line-driven runtime management for adapter execution environments, providing a filesystem/execution client and a preparation routine that handles install detection, sandbox setup, and shell environment configuration.

nodes.name: createCommandManagedRuntimeClient
nodes.summary: Factory that returns a runtime client object exposing file I/O, directory listing, and command execution operations by delegating to a shell runner within the target sandbox environment.

nodes.name: prepareCommandManagedRuntime
nodes.summary: Orchestrates full runtime preparation: detects if an install command is needed, provisions a sandbox via prepareSandboxManagedRuntime, and applies merged runtime exclusions before returning a ready execution runtime.

nodes.name: command-redaction.ts
nodes.summary: Provides regex-based redaction of secrets (bearer tokens, CLI secret flags, env variable assignments, OpenAI keys, GitHub tokens) from shell command strings before logging.

nodes.name: redactCommandText
nodes.summary: Applies a chain of regex replacements to scrub known secret patterns from a command string, replacing them with a configurable redacted placeholder.

nodes.name: execution-target-sandbox.test.ts
nodes.summary: Large integration-style test suite for the sandbox execution target, validating local sandbox runner creation, process spawning, memory limits, working directory resolution, and sandbox lifecycle edge cases.

nodes.name: execution-target.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the execution target module, covering target resolution, adapter configuration validation, and end-to-end execution paths for various adapter types.
